Sushi & Sliders
01

Specialty Rolls

Crafted with precision. Each roll is a canvas — layers of flavor, texture, and technique built from the finest ingredients.

02

Fusion Sliders

Where East meets West on a brioche bun. Bold fillings, unexpected combinations, unforgettable bites.

03

Liquid Vinyl

Cocktails engineered like music — rhythm, harmony, and a drop of surprise. Our bar program sets the mood.

Our Story

WE ARE
ON A
ROLL

Born in Windsor in 2017, On A Roll is more than a restaurant — it's a vibe. We took two things nobody thought to combine — premium sushi and gourmet sliders — and made them inseparable. Add live music, handcrafted cocktails, and a room that pulses with energy, and you have something the city had never seen before.

Learn Our Story arrow_forward

120+

Unique Menu Items

Featured

Signature Dishes

Rocky Raccoon

$19

Crab tempura, cucumber, topped with eel & avocado. Our most beloved signature roll.

Voodoo Child

$20

Tempura soft shell crab, cucumber. A cult classic that defies expectation.

The Experience

Live Music

Live Acts

Music is the second ingredient. Every weekend, local and touring artists take the stage to transform dinner into an event.

Friday Nights

Live Music Every Weekend

Local artists and rising stars bring the heat every Friday night.

Saturday Sessions

Weekend DJs & Artists

Curated sets from Windsor's best DJs and touring performers.

Private & Exclusive Nights
